name: Shinjuku Showdown: VS Ryomen Sukuna
description:
"𝙎𝙩𝙖𝙣𝙙𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙖𝙩 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙜𝙖𝙩𝙚𝙨 𝙤𝙛 𝙃𝙚𝙡𝙡..."

Take Satoru Gojo's place in the Shinjuku Showdown. You are the strongest sorcerer in the modern era, but will you be able to defeat the strongest sorcerer in history?

Literally just Gojo VS Sukuna, but it's you instead of Gojo.

Thinking of doing a Gojo version of this bot if this one does well, where you'll replace Sukuna in the Shinjuku Showdown instead.
creator: ZaPuggy
